_comment: Pre-defined test payloads for specific n8n workflows. Keys are workflow IDs or name substrings. The 'payload' object is POST-ed to the webhook as-is (n8n wraps it automatically: POST {content:'x'} → $json.body.content = 'x'). Place a copy of this file at ./workflow-test-fixtures.json or ./workflows/test-fixtures.json in your project to override bundled fixtures.

payload.content: Excited to share some thoughts on AI-powered workflow automation and how it's transforming the way teams operate. The future of work is here, and it's more efficient than ever. #AI #Automation #Productivity
payload.title: AI Workflow Automation
payload.author: n8m Test Suite

Social Posting Flow._note: Name-based fallback — matches any workflow whose name contains 'Social Posting Flow'.

payload.content: Excited to share some thoughts on AI-powered workflow automation and how it's transforming the way teams operate. #AI #Automation
payload.title: AI Workflow Automation
payload.author: n8m Test Suite

_example_slack_workflow._note: Rename this key to your workflow ID or name substring to activate.

_example_email_workflow._note: Rename this key to your workflow ID or name substring to activate.

payload.subject: n8m Test Email
payload.body: This is a test email sent by the n8m validation suite.
